description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_EN: Inbound Cross-boundary Transportation Arrangements / Precautions during long weekend of Ching Ming Festival holiday
description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_CN: 清明節假期長周末入境跨境交通安排/注意事項

2025-04-05T15:00:00.CONTENT_EN:
The Transport Department anticipates that more travellers would return to Hong Kong via land-based Boundary Control Points (BCPs) later today (5 April) and tomorrow (6 April). It is anticipated that the demand for public transport services will be higher during the period and the waiting time for public transport services may be longer. The Transport Department has instructed public transport operators to strengthen their services to meet passenger demand. In the meantime, the number of cross boundary private cars returning from the Mainland / Macao to Hong Kong via the Hong Kong-Zhuhai-Macao Bridge (HZMB) will also increase substantially. The TD appeals to these inbound travellers to plan their trips in advance, allow sufficient travelling time and make their journeys outside peak periods as far as possible. 

For the HZMB, in order to plan their journey ahead, the public can make use of TD’s mobile application "HKeMobility" to access the snapshots of traffic condition at inbound and outbound vehicle plazas of HZMB Hong Kong Port. They can also check real-time situations of the vehicle clearance plaza of the Zhuhai port through the WeChat official accounts "hzmbzhport" or "zhuhaifabu" (traffic-info. gzazhka. com:5015/#/) (Chinese only), and check the forecast of peak hours of inbound and outbound vehicles at the HZMB Zhuhai Port through the WeChat official account of the HZMB integrated information dissemination platform (mp. weixin. qq. com/s/mT9D9et-FybKKXDw9nJ9Dg) (Chinese only). 

The TD will closely monitor the traffic conditions at all BCPs and disseminate the latest traffic information through various channels. Members of the public are advised to check the latest traffic news through radio, television broadcasts, and HKeMobility.
2025-04-05T15:00:00.CONTENT_CN:
運輸署預料今日(4月5日)較後時間及明日(4月6日)將有較多跨境旅客使用各陸路管制站回港，預計在返港高峰期間的公共運輸需求會較高，公共運輸服務的等候時間或會較長。運輸署已指示公共運輸服務營辦商加強服務應付乘客需求。而經港珠澳大橋由內地／澳門返港的跨境私家車亦會顯著增加。運輸署呼籲入境旅客及早規劃行程，預留充裕交通時間，盡量選擇於非繁忙時段出行。

就港珠澳大橋，市民可透過運輸署流動應用程式「香港出行易」查閱港珠澳大橋香港口岸出境及入境客車通關廣場的交通快拍，亦可透過「港珠澳大橋珠海口岸」或「珠海發布」微信公眾號內的「大橋口岸實時通關」服務(traffic-info.gzazhka.com:5015/#/)，查閱大橋珠海口岸的車輛實時通關情況；以及透過「港珠澳大橋統一信息發佈平台」微信公眾號（mp.weixin.qq.com/s/mT9D9et-FybKKXDw9nJ9Dg），查看大橋珠海口岸車輛出入境高峰時段預測，以便及早計劃行程。

運輸署會密切留意各口岸的交通情況，並透過不同渠道發放最新交通資訊。市民請留意電台、電視台及「香港出行易」發放的最新交通消息。

description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_EN: Enhanced service during Ching Ming Festival

2025-04-07T06:13:00.CONTENT_EN: To facilitate grave sweeping activities, service of MTR Bus route K52A between Tuen Mun Station and Tsang Tsui Columbarium will be enhanced: · 12 – 13 April · Service hours will be extended · Frequencies will be increased to about 10 to 30 minutes during most periods Please refer to MTRCL website for more information.
2025-04-07T06:13:00.CONTENT_CN: 港鐵巴士K52A路綫來往屯門站及曾咀靈灰安置所亦加強服務，方便乘客外出掃墓。 ·4月12及13日 ·延長服務時間 ·大部分時段加密至約10 至30 分鐘一班車 詳情請瀏覽港鐵公司網頁。

2025-04-08T09:03:00.CONTENT_EN: Part of the lanes of Tai Po Road - Sha Tin (Kowloon bound) near Wo Che Estate which was closed due to traffic accident is re-opened to all traffic.
2025-04-08T09:03:00.CONTENT_CN: 較早前因交通意外而封閉的大埔公路　–　沙田段(往九龍方向)近禾輋邨的部份行車線現已解封。

2025-04-08T09:28:00.CONTENT_EN: The fast lane of Fanling Highway (Yuen Long bound) near Tai Tau Leng which was closed due to vehicle breakdown is re-opened to all traffic.

2025-04-08T11:30:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to vehicle breakdown , part of the lanes of Tuen Mun Road (Kowloon bound) near San Wo Lane Playground is still being closed to all traffic. Only remaining lanes are available to motorists. Traffic queue on Tuen Mun Road (Kowloon bound) ends at Yuen Long Highway near Nai Wai. Traffic is congested now.
2025-04-08T11:30:00.CONTENT_CN: 因車輛故障，屯門公路(往九龍方向)近新和里遊樂場的部份行車線仍然封閉。 駕駛人士只可使用餘下行車線行車。 現時在屯門公路(往九龍方向)的車龍龍尾已到元朗公路近泥圍。 現時上址交通擠塞。

description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_EN: MTR Service arrangement concert at Kai Tak Sports Park for
description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_CN: 啟德體育園演唱會港鐵服務安排

2025-04-08T11:14:00.CONTENT_EN:
Kai Tak Sports Park will host concerts in the evenings of 8, 9, 11 and 12 April. If passengers are heading to the venue, exit at either Kai Tak or Sung Wong Toi stations. MTR recommend to set off early as the entry time is during the stations' peak hours. 

Passenger flow is expected to increase after the show. Crowd management measures will be in place in both stations and one-way passenger flow may be implemented at specific entrances and exits. MTR will increase the train frequency as necessary. Allow extra time for journeys and have the return ticket ready in advance. 

Passengers that need to cross the boundary at Lo Wu please note the departure time of the last train connecting to Lo Wu:

For more details, please visit: https://www.td.gov.hk/en/special_news/spnews.htm.
2025-04-08T11:14:00.CONTENT_CN:
啟德體育園於4月8、9、11及12日晚上舉行演唱會，前往觀賞的乘客可使用啟德或宋皇臺站。入場時間為車站繁忙時段，乘客可提早出發。

散場時，客流較多，車站會實施客流管理措施，個別出入口或會作單向進出安排，港鐵亦會按需要加密列車班次。請為行程預留較多時間及提前準備回程車票。

需要過境的乘客，請留意往羅湖尾班車時間：

詳情請參看: https://www.td.gov.hk/tc/special_news/spnews.htm。
